title: Author product-detail views for the Detail & Forms aisle
description: Author four product-detail views — one per Detail & Forms widget — reusing the shared page skeleton from task 14.

context.aisle_scope: Four products: TDetailHeader, TKeyValueField, TFormSection, TInteractiveForm.
context.form_section_specials: The showcase page shows TFormSection in two cards side by side (or stacked on mobile): one driven by a formConfig (TFormConfig from turbo_forms with mixed field types), one driven by children (custom shadcn_ui widgets). A toggle in debug controls flips which card is highlighted.
context.interactive_form_specials: The showcase page walks through a three-step TInteractiveForm flow: text input step (name + email), card selection step (pick a plan), calendar step (pick a date). The underlying TInteractiveFormController is owned by the view model. The preview renders the form exactly once — its step advancement is the interactivity, not debug sliders.

goals: Four product detail view files under example/lib/showcase/feature/detail_and_forms/views/{widget_snake_case}_showcase/.
Each uses the shared page skeleton.
TFormSection page shows both modes rendering real fields.
TInteractiveForm page exercises all three step types end-to-end with real navigation buttons in the preview region.
non_goals: Persisting submissions anywhere — this is a showcase.
Adding real validation beyond what TInteractiveForm enforces out of the box.
acceptance_criteria: Opening each of the four product detail pages renders the full page structure.
TInteractiveForm page lets the visitor step through all three steps and submit at the end (with submission toasting a success message from shadcn_ui).
TFormSection page renders both mode cards with real fields from turbo_forms and shadcn_ui.
TDetailHeader page toasts when the save button fires.
tools_to_use: RepoPrompt MCP for reading TFormSection, TInteractiveForm, and TInteractiveFormController sources.

verification_gate: Manual end-to-end walk of the TInteractiveForm multi-step flow.
Manual verification of both TFormSection mode cards rendering real fields.

quality_checklist.performance: Controller is created once, not recreated per rebuild.

follow_up_notes: Phase 3 task 08 created 4 product-detail view models for the Detail & Forms aisle. Summary:
1. TKeyValueFieldShowcaseViewModel — cells: label (String), value (String). Mutators: updateLabel, updateValue.
2. TDetailHeaderShowcaseViewModel — cells: title (String), subtitle (String), showSave (bool), lastSaveFired (String?). Mutators: updateTitle, updateSubtitle, toggleShowSave, onSave.

3. TFormSectionShowcaseViewModel — cells: mode (FormSectionMode: formConfig | children). Getter: formConfig (ShowcaseFormConfig with 3 fields: name text, role select, isActive checkbox). Mutator: updateMode. Enums: FormSectionMode, ShowcaseFormField.

4. TInteractiveFormShowcaseViewModel — constructor-injects MockContentService. Owns TInteractiveFormController (constructed in initialise, disposed in dispose) with 3 steps: TTextInputStepConfig (name), TCardSelectionStepConfig (plans from MockContentService), TCalendarStepConfig (date). Cells: selectedPlan (String?), selectedDate (DateTime?). Getter: controller (TInteractiveFormController). Plan cards wired with onTap→selectedPlan and isSelected→selectedPlan check.
